from fastapi import FastAPI
from pydantic import BaseModel

app = FastAPI()


class UserResponse(BaseModel):
    id: int
    name: str
    email: str


class OrderResponse(BaseModel):
    id: int
    total: float
    status: str


class PaymentResponse(BaseModel):
    id: str
    status: str
    amount: int


@app.get("/users/{user_id}", response_model=UserResponse)
async def get_user(user_id: int):
    user = await fetch_user(user_id)
    return UserResponse(id=user.id, name=user.name, email=user.email)


@app.get("/orders", response_model=list[OrderResponse])
async def list_orders(status: str = "active"):
    orders = await fetch_orders(status)
    return [OrderResponse(id=o.id, total=o.total, status=o.status) for o in orders]


@app.post("/payments", response_model=PaymentResponse)
async def create_payment(amount: int, currency: str):
    result = await process_payment(amount, currency)
    return PaymentResponse(id=result.id, status=result.status, amount=result.amount)
